training_status: sedentary (due to chronic pain and post-peptide reaction)

side_effects.description: extreme anxiety and wired feeling, described as feeling like injected with meth
severe whole-body pain, described as feeling dipped in acid and beaten with a baseball bat; exceeded baseline chronic pain significantly
woke up at 10:22 pm completely wired and unable to sleep after taking peptide at 5:30 pm
abnormally elevated heart rate with minimal activity (pulse 144 bpm just standing in line at eye doctor); elevated blood pressure with simple activity
neuropathy flare-up and worsening; user reports symptoms suggest autonomic/sympathetic nervous system dysfunction
CNS dysfunction described as feeling like sympathetic nervous system was nuked or electrocuted; persistent symptoms week post-injection

protocol_notes: Obtained from compounding pharmacy in New York City via prescription from Manhattan-based doctor. User reports source was legitimate (called pharmacy to verify no Chinese relabeling). Dose listed as '25 units' which commenter notes is not standard measurement without knowing syringe dilution (actual mcg dose unclear). User baseline chronic pain score 6-8/10. Post-injection symptoms persisted for approximately 12 hours at worst, but autonomic symptoms (elevated HR/BP with activity) and neuropathy not fully resolved 1 week post-injection. User was taking alpha lipoic acid to manage neuropathy post-reaction.
